changes_this_version: Added Fetch Agent Config node — reads stale_days and repo from agent_config table
Code node now uses config values with fallbacks (stale_days default 3, repo default thompsmanlearn/claudis)
Added Log Telegram Audit node — records telegram_send action in audit_log after every Telegram delivery
Evaluator concerns from 3/5 score addressed; re-eval still 3/5 due to historical audit ratio artifact (will self-resolve)

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ actor: 'github_issue_tracker', action: 'telegram_send', target: 'telegram', details: { chat_id: 8513796837, stale_count: $('Filter Stale Issues').item.json.stale_count, repo: $('Filter Stale Issues').item.json.repo, scan_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'github_issue_tracker', experiment_id: 'scan_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), output_type: 'issue_scan', content: $('Filter Stale Issues').item.json, confidence: 1.0, promoted: false, reviewed_by_bill: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ actor: 'github_issue_tracker', action: 'write_experimental_output', target: 'experimental_outputs', details: { stale_count: $('Filter Stale Issues').item.json.stale_count, total_open: $('Filter Stale Issues').item.json.total_open, scan_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) } }) }}
